ENPH.title: Here's How Much $100 Invested In Enphase Energy 10 Years Ago Would Be Worth Today

INTC.title: Trump Helped Ignite Intel Stock's Monster Rally — Now Two Congressmen Are Cashing Out

macro_events.event_summary: US Senate advances a war powers resolution to end military action in Iran, signaling bipartisan pushback against the Trump administration and raising odds of de-escalation.
primary_drivers: Reduced geopolitical risk premium in oil/defense
Lower probability of sustained Middle East military operations reduces defense spending tailwind
Potential easing path on Iran oil export enforcement increases global supply expectations

beneficiaries.rationale: Jet fuel is ~25-30% of operating costs; lower crude on de-escalation directly expands margins. Delta has highest fuel sensitivity among legacy carriers due to refinery ownership exposure.
International route exposure to Middle East/Asia airspace; de-escalation reduces rerouting costs and fuel hedging pressure. High operating leverage to crude declines.
Cruise operator with heavy bunker fuel exposure (~10% of costs) and consumer discretionary sensitivity; lower oil + reduced geopolitical anxiety supports bookings.
Naphtha/ethane feedstock costs track crude; de-escalation lowers input costs for commodity chemicals with direct margin passthrough.

losers.rationale: Largest US integrated oil; geopolitical risk premium in Brent unwinds on de-escalation signal. Direct earnings sensitivity to crude price (~$0.5B EPS per $5/bbl).
Highest beta US E&P to crude price among large caps due to Permian pure-play exposure and leverage; unwinds geopolitical premium fastest.
Prime contractor for missile defense/PAC-3 systems heavily deployed/restocked in Iran scenario; congressional pushback on war reduces supplemental defense appropriations probability.
Tomahawk, SM-3, and Patriot missile production directly tied to Middle East munitions consumption; reduced operations slows restock orders.
Defense IT/ISR contractor with elevated revenue tied to active CENTCOM operations; de-escalation trims near-term task order flow.
Oilfield services capex sensitivity — sustained lower crude reduces NAM completion activity and pricing power.

headlines: Senate advances measure to end military action in Iran in rebuke to Trump
